scope: Knowledge document version write conflict/stale version route-level evidence.
expected: A document version numbering collision must return a stable public 409 conflict, must not create a partial version row, and must not write misleading audit side effects.
actual: Pass: targeted route test returned 409 knowledge_version_conflict and fixture readback showed zero new versions/audit side effects for the collision path.

verification.notes: Initial sandboxed attempt failed with spawn EPERM while loading Vite/esbuild; rerun outside sandbox passed. Vitest emitted an existing duplicate assignment.delete warning in packages/domain/src/planning/commandReducer.ts, unrelated to this slice.
verification.command: node_modules\.bin\vitest.cmd run apps/api/src/knowledgeRoutes.test.ts -t "concurrent document version numbering"

coverageImpact: Adds fresh evidence for the knowledge document-version stale/conflict write-flow slice. Broader RISK-WRITE-FLOW-RACE-IDEMPOTENCY remains open for write surfaces outside the covered atoms.
